pr.title: Align Income and Budget hero month navigation sizing
pr.body: ## Summary The month title (for example May), the three heat bars below it, and the Prev / Next controls looked oversized on the Income and Budget hero rows. This change tightens typography and spacing so the center module reads lighter and lines up better with the navigation buttons. ## Changes - **IncomeHub.jsx** and **BudgetCommandCenter.jsx**: Smaller Prev / Next buttons (`marginTop`, height, min width, font size, weight, letter spacing). - **Center card**: Month label reduced from 28px / heavy weight to 20px / 700; slightly tighter padding and grid gaps. - **Heat bars**: Smaller label and amount text, shorter bar tracks, slightly narrower minimum fill width, and tighter vertical gaps between rows. Both tabs now use the same inline style values for this hero block.
pr.author: Freedomfarms
